_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-29 23:16:49Z)**_

The change is in a pure static React mockup file (`docs/vercel_mockup/src/MOCKUP.jsx`). The added code:

1. Appends a hardcoded literal `{ type: 'Gov/Hospital', count: 14, value: 0 }` to a static `discountUsage` array (display-only data).
2. Adds three KPI card divs containing only hardcoded numeric literals multiplied by `vesselScale` (a numeric, internally-derived scalar), interpolated into JSX text via React's auto-escaping default.

No new entry points, no sinks (no `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`, no `eval`, no fetch/exec/shell/SQL/path/IPC/log writes, no URL construction, no deserialization, no auth/RBAC logic). No user input is touched anywhere in the diff. The mockup directory per user memory is explicitly a Vercel design mockup, not a runtime backend. There are no parser/validator changes, no permissions, no observability sinks, no allowlist edits, and no removed controls.
